title: Borat Subsequent Moviefilm: Glorious Nation of Kazakhstan
writer: Peter Baynham • Erica Rivinoja • Dan Mazer • Jena Friedman • Lee Kern
logline: Disgraced journalist Borat is released from prison to deliver a gift to Vice President Pence, but when his monkey dies, he must use his daughter Tutar as the offering instead, leading to a journey across America that exposes both characters to new perspectives on gender, politics, and humanity.
antagonistOrConflict: Premier Nazarbayev's demands and Borat's clash with American culture, plus the father-daughter relationship tension
tone: Provocative, absurdist, politically charged with unexpected moments of genuine emotion
themes: Personal growth through exposure to different perspectives

actBreaks.description: Borat discovers Jonny the monkey is dead and must pivot to using his daughter Tutar as the gift, fundamentally changing the mission.

validation.ruling: Scene 25 ends Act 1 as Tutar reveals her name and the Daughter Owner's Manual, fundamentally changing the story from a simple monkey delivery to a complex father-daughter journey with higher stakes.

actBreaks.description: Tutar rebels against her father and chooses her own path after being influenced by the babysitter and Republican women, creating the central conflict.

validation.ruling: Scene 75 shows Borat's encounter with Jewish women at the synagogue, where his antisemitic beliefs are challenged through their kindness, representing a major thematic shift that changes his worldview.

naturalStructure.structuralPersonality: This is a road movie disguised as a political satire, following the classic mockumentary structure where each encounter builds both comedic momentum and character development. The script cleverly uses Borat's mission as a MacGuffin to explore deeper themes about gender roles and political extremism. What makes it structurally unique is how it balances outrageous set pieces with genuine character growth, particularly in Tutar's arc from oppressed daughter to independent woman. The structure becomes increasingly episodic in Act 2 as they encounter various American subcultures, but maintains narrative drive through the ticking clock of Borat's execution threat and the evolving father-daughter relationship.
naturalStructure.pacingNotes: The pacing accelerates significantly after scene 25 when the core mission shifts, with rapid-fire encounters building to the CPAC infiltration around scene 50. The middle section (scenes 60-90) slows to develop the Tutar-babysitter relationship and Borat's lockdown experience, creating breathing room for character development. The final act picks up intense momentum from the protest scene (91) through the Giuliani climax (107), then shifts to rapid-fire flashback revelations before the resolution.

incitingIncident.description: Premier Nazarbayev assigns Borat a mission, explaining how Barack Obama ruined America but Donald Trump made it great again and became allies with tough leaders worldwide.
incitingIncident.sceneHeading: INT. KAZAKHSTAN PRESIDENTIAL PALACE - OFFICE - DAY

validation.ruling: Scene 9 establishes the main conflict when Premier Nazarbayev assigns Borat the mission to deliver a gift to Michael Pence to earn Trump's respect, shattering Borat's ordinary world and forcing him into action that drives the entire plot.

midpoint.description: Borat confronts rebellious Tutar who refuses surgery, declares herself beautiful as she is, rejects being given as a gift to a man, and claims the daughter manual is full of lies while citing Facebook as truth.

validation.ruling: Scene 75 is already designated as Act Break 2, so Scene 74 serves as the midpoint where Tutar fundamentally transforms from obedient daughter to independent woman, rejecting the gift plan and declaring herself beautiful as she is - a point of no return that shifts the story's direction.

climax.description: Tutar touches Giuliani's knee and leads him to the adjacent bedroom where he massages her neck, asks for her contact information, and lies back on the bed as she removes his microphone.
climax.sceneHeading: INT. HOTEL SUITE - LIVING AREA / BEDROOM - CONTINUOUS

validation.ruling: Scene 107 is the peak confrontation where Borat bursts in on Giuliani and Tutar in the hotel bedroom, creating the highest dramatic tension as the mission reaches its ultimate moment with Borat's shocking interruption in lingerie.

scenes.heading: EXT. MOUNTAIN RANGE [QUARRY] - DAY
scenes.summary: Borat works in a prison chain gang with pickaxe, wearing prison uniform with large afro, as he narrates how his life became terrible.

scenes.heading: EXT. NEWS FOOTAGE - DAY
scenes.summary: News footage shows Borat's 2006 movie was a hit, but Kazakhstan became a laughing stock with plummeting exports of potassium and pubis.

scenes.heading: EXT. VILLAGE SQUARE - DAY
scenes.summary: Library footage shows a large Gypsy celebration with people going wild and having a great time.

scenes.heading: EXT. MEL GIBSON SQUARE - DAY
scenes.summary: Borat's Kazakh TV microphone is snatched and broken in two as he's banned from reporting and forced to hand over his jacket.

scenes.heading: EXT. KAZAKHSTAN AMUSEMENT PARK - DAY
scenes.summary: Borat is suspended in a mankini above a high-striker attraction where a giant hits him in the balls with a mallet, causing him to wail in pain.

scenes.heading: EXT. MOUNTAIN RANGE [QUARRY] - DAY
scenes.summary: Borat chips away with his pickaxe in the gulag before being led by a guard to a prison van for transport to the Presidential Palace.

scenes.heading: EXT. KAZAKHSTAN PRESIDENTIAL PALACE, ALMATY - DAY
scenes.summary: The prison van pulls up to the Kazakhstan Presidential Palace in Almaty.

scenes.heading: INT. KAZAKHSTAN PRESIDENTIAL PALACE - CORRIDOR - DAY
scenes.summary: Guards drag Borat through the corridors of the Kazakhstan Presidential Palace.

scenes.heading: INT. KAZAKHSTAN PRESIDENTIAL PALACE - OFFICE - DAY
scenes.summary: Premier Nazarbayev assigns Borat a mission, explaining how Barack Obama ruined America but Donald Trump made it great again and became allies with tough leaders worldwide.
scenes.turningPointNote: Borat receives his crucial mission from the Premier, setting the entire plot in motion

scenes.heading: INT. HAIRCUT ROOM IN PRESIDENTIAL PALACE - DAY
scenes.summary: Borat beams as he gets his hair cut in the Presidential Palace.

scenes.heading: INT. MEDICAL ROOM IN PRESIDENTIAL PALACE - DAY
scenes.summary: Dr. Yamak gives Borat a medical examination and injects him with a syringe containing 'Gypsy Tears' for protection.

scenes.heading: INT. ANOTHER ROOM IN PRESIDENTIAL PALACE - DAY
scenes.summary: Borat is given his old suitcase containing his iconic grey suit, which he tenderly pulls out and smiles at.

scenes.heading: EXT. BORAT’S VILLAGE (KUZCEK) - DAY
scenes.summary: Borat returns to his village Kuzcek in his grey suit, greeting women pulling carts with men on them, planning to kiss his sons and make love to his wife.

scenes.heading: INT. BORAT’S OLD HOUSE - DAY
scenes.summary: Borat discovers his neighbor Nursultan Tulyakbay has taken over his house, wearing his pajamas and possessing his belongings and three sons.

scenes.heading: INT. BORAT’S STABLE - DAY
scenes.summary: Borat finds his remaining livestock and discovers his 15-year-old daughter Tutar tied to a pole in the stable, watching a Melania cartoon on television.
scenes.turningPointNote: Borat discovers he has a daughter, introducing the key relationship that will drive the emotional arc

scenes.heading: EXT. VILLAGE / HIGHWAY OUT OF TOWN - DAY
scenes.summary: Villagers jeer and shout angrily at Borat as he departs, pulling a hand cart with Jonny's crate toward America.

scenes.heading: EXT. MAP GRAPHIC - DAY
scenes.summary: A map graphic shows Borat's zigzagging boat journey through multiple countries over 22 days, finally arriving at the Port of Galveston, Texas.

scenes.heading: EXT. GALVESTON PORT, TEXAS - DAY
scenes.summary: Borat exits a shitty ship at Galveston Port, Texas.

scenes.heading: INT. HORSEBOX - DAY
scenes.summary: Borat transforms a horsebox into a monkey paradise with pin-up photos, treats, miniature spirits, a four-poster bed and tiny toilet for Jonny.

scenes.heading: EXT. STREET - SMALL TOWN TEXAS - DAY
scenes.summary: Fans recognize Borat on the street despite his attempts to deny his identity, forcing him to hide his face with a paper bag and nearly get hit by a car.

scenes.heading: INT. HALLOWEEN COSTUME STORE - DAY
scenes.summary: Borat buys various disguises including a fat suit and wigs from a costume store, then observes people obsessed with their phones while disguised as an Uzbek journalist.

scenes.heading: EXT. PARKING LOT - DAY
scenes.summary: Borat opens Jonny's crate expecting to find the monkey but instead discovers his daughter Tutar, filthy and disheveled, who claims she accidentally fell in.
scenes.turningPointNote: The mission is compromised when Tutar replaces Jonny as the 'gift,' fundamentally changing Borat's plans

scenes.heading: INT. BORAT’S PICKUP / EXT. STREET - MOMENTS LATER
scenes.summary: Borat removes his Uzbek disguise while driving and uses his phone to locate America's closest fax machine.

scenes.heading: INT. FAX STORE - A LITTLE LATER
scenes.summary: Borat conducts a fax conversation with Premier Nazarbayev, receiving increasingly threatening messages including a photo of a small penis and death threats.

scenes.heading: EXT. FAX STORE - DAY
scenes.summary: Tutar shows Borat her 'Daughter Owner's Manual' from the Ministry of Agriculture and Wildlife, revealing her registered name and ownership papers.

scenes.heading: EXT. FARM SUPPLY STORE - DAY
scenes.summary: The horsebox arrives at a farm supply store with Tutar running out of breath after chasing it, as Borat laughs that he beat her.

scenes.heading: INT/EXT. AGRICULTURAL SUPPLY STORE - YARD - DAY
scenes.summary: Borat shops for a cage for his daughter with a salesperson, discussing prices and Trump's caging of Mexican children, while Tutar excitedly wants the expensive cage.

scenes.heading: INT/EXT. HORSEBOX / SIDE OF ROAD - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Borat digs a shit-hole under Tutar's cage while she watches the Melania cartoon showing Donald grabbing Melania's vagina at a ball.

scenes.heading: INT. PICKUP - A LITTLE LATER
scenes.summary: Tutar rides shotgun in the pickup, shouting excitedly out the window before Borat pulls her back inside and tells her they're meeting a leading feminist.

scenes.heading: INT. LUXURIOUS HOUSE - DAY
scenes.summary: Instagram influencer Macey Chanel teaches Tutar about being a sugar baby, advising her to be submissive and weak, and to date nearly dead older men.

scenes.heading: INT. PICKUP - DAY
scenes.summary: Tutar asks Borat to come with her to the hairdresser, and he agrees to disguise himself as an American.

scenes.heading: INT. SALON - DAY
scenes.summary: Borat, disguised as 'Bob Chevrolet,' takes Tutar to a salon where she mistakenly lifts her skirt to show her pubic hair instead of her head hair.

scenes.heading: INT. SPRAY TAN SALON - DAY
scenes.summary: At a spray tan salon, Borat asks what color is best for a racist family, and the spray tan lady recommends staying at a 6 or 7 on the darkness chart.

scenes.heading: INT. MAKEUP STORE - NEXT DAY
scenes.summary: At a makeup store, Tutar bites into lipstick thinking it's food, followed by Borat also taking a bite, while a cosmetics clerk tries to stop them.

scenes.heading: INT. PAGEANT CLOTHES STORE
scenes.summary: At a pageant store, Borat asks for the 'no means yes' section while Michelle helps Tutar try on dresses, including mistakenly wearing a plastic garment bag.

scenes.heading: EXT. HORSEBOX - THAT NIGHT
scenes.summary: Borat shows Tutar photos in the Daughter Manual claiming the Titanic sinking happened when a woman tried journalism, and other disasters from women's activities.

scenes.heading: EXT. TEXAS STATE FAIR - THE NEXT DAY
scenes.summary: At the Texas State Fair, Borat keeps Tutar on a leash but notices other fathers holding daughters' hands, so he uses a plastic bag to hold her hand while they dance together.

scenes.heading: EXT. STREET / PARKING LOT - DAY
scenes.summary: Walking away from the fair, Tutar asks if a father could ever love a daughter as much as sons, and Borat tells her no, they are sentenced to death.

scenes.heading: INT. FANCY CAKE SHOP - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Borat orders a chocolate cake with 'Jews Will Not Replace Us' written in icing, along with a smiley face, while the cake seller complies with the request.

scenes.heading: EXT. ALLEY BEHIND CAKE SHOP - MOMENTS LATER
scenes.summary: Behind a dumpster, Borat feeds Tutar a cupcake with a plastic baby inside, causing her to choke and believe she swallowed a real baby.

scenes.heading: INT. CRISIS PREGNANCY CENTER - LATER
scenes.summary: At a crisis pregnancy center, an anti-abortionist refuses to remove Tutar's 'baby,' insisting it's a living life with a heartbeat that God created, despite Borat's protests.

scenes.heading: INT. TRUCK STOP BATHROOM - 30 MINUTES LATER
scenes.summary: In a truck stop bathroom, Borat encourages Tutar to push out the 'baby' while a trucker overhears, and she refuses to flush it down after it comes out.

scenes.heading: EXT. PICKUP / HORSEBOX - LATER
scenes.summary: Borat, disguised as 'Cliff Safari,' meets debutante coach Dr. Jean Sheffield to prepare his daughter 'Miss Ellie' for a ball.

scenes.heading: EXT. DEBUTANTE BALL - THAT NIGHT
scenes.summary: Establishing shots show debutantes and their fathers arriving at the Macon Debutante Ball in Georgia.

scenes.heading: INT. DEBUTANTE BALL / DEBUTANTE COACH - NIGHT
scenes.summary: At the debutante ball, Borat and fully made-over Tutar enter arm-in-arm as 'Sandra Jessica Parker Drummond' and her father, with Tutar performing a bad curtsy when announced.
scenes.turningPointNote: Father and daughter share their first genuine bonding moment, walking arm-in-arm at the ball

scenes.heading: EXT. RIVER - NEXT MORNING
scenes.summary: Tutar washes Borat's trousers by the river as he runs down excitedly with news that Pence is speaking nearby and they can gift her today.

scenes.heading: EXT. PICKUP - DAY
scenes.summary: Borat drives toward the Conservative Political Action Conference and enters the CPAC hotel wearing a KKK outfit, claiming to be Stephen Miller.

scenes.heading: INT. CONVENTION CENTER - HALLWAY / MEN’S ROOM - MOMENTS LATER
scenes.summary: Borat walks down the convention center hallway toward the men's bathroom.

scenes.heading: INT. CONVENTION CENTER - BATHROOM STALL - MOMENTS LATER
scenes.summary: In a bathroom stall, Borat changes into a Trump mask and fat suit disguise, then lifts Tutar over his shoulder as they prepare to approach Pence.

scenes.heading: INT. CONVENTION CENTER - AUDITORIUM - SAME TIME
scenes.summary: (no summary)

scenes.heading: INT. CONVENTION CENTER - SAME TIME
scenes.summary: Borat carries Tutar over his shoulder and walks through the convention center lobby looking exactly like Trump while people stare.

scenes.heading: INT. CONVENTION CENTER - AUDITORIUM - MOMENTS LATER
scenes.summary: Pence delivers a speech about coronavirus to an applauding crowd, stating there are fifteen cases in the US and they are ready for anything.

scenes.heading: INT. CONVENTION CENTER - OUTSIDE AUDITORIUM DOORS - SAME TIME
scenes.summary: Borat and Tutar push open the auditorium double doors.

scenes.heading: INT. CONVENTION CENTER - AUDITORIUM - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Borat bursts into the auditorium carrying Tutar, interrupts Pence's speech shouting about bringing him a girl, and gets confronted by angry crowd members while Pence shakes his head.
scenes.turningPointNote: The mission to deliver Tutar to Pence fails spectacularly in public

scenes.heading: INT. CONVENTION CENTER - LOBBY - MINUTES LATER
scenes.summary: Security seizes Borat and leads him out while security dogs growl at him.

scenes.heading: EXT. FAX STORE - DAY - DAY
scenes.summary: Borat and Tutar arrive back at the fax store where Borat begins dictating a message to Premier Nazarbayev about Pence not accepting the gift.

scenes.heading: INT. FAX STORE - DAY
scenes.summary: The fax employee reads Nazarbayev's response threatening Borat with excruciating death involving cows and turnips, making Borat look sick.

scenes.heading: INT. PICKUP TRUCK - DAY
scenes.summary: Tutar asks what's wrong while Borat denies being in danger, then she shows him photos of Trump associates asking about gifting herself to them, with Borat explaining they're all in jail or arrested until she suggests Giuliani.

scenes.heading: INT. FAX STORE - A LITTLE LATER
scenes.summary: The fax employee reads a message stating Borat will live if he delivers Tutar to Giuliani, causing Borat to celebrate with high-fives.
scenes.turningPointNote: Borat gets a reprieve from execution with new mission to deliver Tutar to Giuliani

scenes.heading: INT/EXT. FOOTAGE - DAY
scenes.summary: Footage shows Giuliani making speeches and appearing with Trump while Borat's voiceover describes him as Trump's best friend and a dignified statesman.

scenes.heading: EXT. OUTSIDE PLASTIC SURGEON’S OFFICE - DAY
scenes.summary: Borat in Uzbek disguise and Tutar in a yellow dress arrive at a cosmetic surgery center and both try to enter the door simultaneously.

scenes.heading: INT. PLASTIC SURGEON’S OFFICE - MINUTES LATER
scenes.summary: An unethical plastic surgeon suggests nose refinement and breast implants for Tutar, with both Borat and the surgeon making antisemitic comments about Jewish noses.

scenes.heading: INT. PLASTIC SURGEON’S OFFICE - RECEPTION - MINUTES LATER
scenes.summary: The accounts manager quotes $21,751 for surgery, causing Borat to fart, then he unsuccessfully tries to negotiate using potatoes instead of implants or allowing perverts to watch.

scenes.heading: EXT. STREET / BABYSITTER’S HOUSE - NEXT DAY
scenes.summary: Borat leaves Tutar with babysitter Jeanise Jones, a confident African-American woman who represents the mother Tutar never had.

scenes.heading: EXT. PICKUP / STREET - DAY
scenes.summary: Borat works as a hairdresser cutting hair for cantankerous customer Randy, showing photos of his previous barbering work on livestock.

scenes.heading: INT. BABYSITTER'S HOUSE - SAME TIME
scenes.summary: The babysitter reads from Tutar's daughter manual about a girl who touched herself and got bitten by her angry vagina, with the babysitter looking confused and concerned about Tutar's discomfort.

scenes.heading: 46 INT/EXT. BABYSITTER’S CAR / STREET - MOMENTS LATER 46
scenes.summary: Tutar freaks out and cries while the babysitter drives, screaming that it's impossible for women to drive and that the babysitter must be a man dressed as a woman.

scenes.heading: INT/EXT. BARBER SHOP - SAME TIME
scenes.summary: Borat finishes the haircut, kisses Randy on the head, receives cash payment, and speeds off overjoyed to the plastic surgeon.

scenes.heading: INT/EXT. BABYSITTER’S CAR / PLASTIC SURGEON’S OFFICE - 5:59PM
scenes.summary: The babysitter drops Tutar off at the plastic surgery office and tries to dissuade her from getting surgery, telling her she's pretty and any man should like her as she is.

scenes.heading: INT. MEETING ROOM NEXT TO PLASTIC SURGEON - EVENING
scenes.summary: Tutar wanders into a Women for Trump meeting where the women confirm they drive cars, own multiple cars, and that men often tell lies, shocking Tutar with these revelations.

scenes.heading: INT. REPUBLICAN WOMEN’S MEETING - BATHROOM - 1 MINUTE LATER
scenes.summary: Tutar enters the bathroom, looks at the daughter manual, then tentatively touches herself and discovers she wasn't sucked in and actually likes it.
scenes.turningPointNote: Tutar discovers the manual's lies about female sexuality through direct experience

scenes.heading: INT. MEETING ROOM NEXT TO PLASTIC SURGEON - MINUTES LATER
scenes.summary: Tutar takes the microphone at the Republican women's meeting and announces she put her fingers on her genitals and wasn't sucked in, shocking the women with her explicit revelation.

scenes.heading: EXT. PLASTIC SURGEON’S OFFICE - SAME
scenes.summary: Borat arrives back at the plastic surgeon's office in his Uzbek disguise, excited, and enters the building.

scenes.heading: EXT. PLASTIC SURGEON’S OFFICE - 6PM
scenes.summary: Borat confronts rebellious Tutar who refuses surgery, declares herself beautiful as she is, rejects being given as a gift to a man, and claims the daughter manual is full of lies while citing Facebook as truth.
scenes.turningPointNote: Tutar fully rebels against her father and the patriarchal system, refusing to be treated as property

scenes.heading: INT. SYNAGOGUE - DAY
scenes.summary: Borat enters a synagogue dressed in antisemitic costume and meets two elderly Jewish women who gently correct his prejudices, with Judith letting him touch her normal-sized nose.

scenes.heading: INT. SYNAGOGUE - 15 MINUTES LATER
scenes.summary: Borat eats chicken soup with the Jewish women and tells his story, then Judith reveals she was in the Holocaust, shocking Borat who believed it was a lie.
scenes.turningPointNote: Borat learns the Holocaust was real, challenging his cultural beliefs

scenes.heading: EXT. SYNAGOGUE - PARKING LOT - DAY
scenes.summary: Borat skips joyfully to his vehicle, overjoyed that the Holocaust happened and his culture was right, deciding he must find Tutar immediately to deliver her to Giuliani.

scenes.heading: EXT. TOWN STREETS - DAY
scenes.summary: Borat walks through deserted streets calling for Tutar, confused by the empty businesses and bars.

scenes.heading: EXT. GUN STORE - SAME STREET - MINUTES LATER
scenes.summary: Borat meets Jerry outside a gun store who explains everyone is quarantining due to a virus, and Jerry reluctantly agrees to let Borat stay at his log cabin home.

scenes.heading: INT. LOCKDOWN HOUSE - THE NEXT DAY
scenes.summary: Borat tries to kill the virus by hitting walls with a frying pan while Jim explains you can't see the virus, then they work together spraying Lysol and hitting the spots with the pan.

scenes.heading: INT. LOCKDOWN HOUSE - ANOTHER DAY
scenes.summary: Borat exercises nearly naked in Jerry and Jim's faces during their quiet morning, then puts dishes and random items in the washing machine, breaking them.

scenes.heading: INT. LOCKDOWN HOUSE - ANOTHER DAY
scenes.summary: Borat orders flashlights through Alexa but receives fleshlights instead, confusing him when Jerry and Jim realize what they actually are.

scenes.heading: INT. LOCKDOWN HOUSE - ANOTHER DAY
scenes.summary: Borat and Jim continue their synchronized virus-killing routine with Lysol spray and frying pan until Jim declares they're done.

scenes.heading: INT. LOCKDOWN HOUSE - DAY
scenes.summary: Jerry and Jim express anti-Democrat views while Borat agrees they should have fewer rights, with the men bonding over shared political beliefs.

scenes.heading: INT. LOCKDOWN HOUSE - DAY
scenes.summary: Jim teaches Borat to sing an anti-Obama song on guitar, with lyrics calling Obama a traitor and suggesting he should be jailed.

scenes.heading: INT. LOCKDOWN HOUSE - EVENING
scenes.summary: Jerry and Jim explain that women have rights and brains like men, while Borat shows them the daughter manual with female anatomy diagrams.

scenes.heading: INT. LOCKDOWN HOUSE - NEXT DAY
scenes.summary: The men discover Tutar on a computer screen working as a right-wing reporter, with Jim and Jerry confirming it's her by comparing photos, leading them to find information about an anti-lockdown protest.
scenes.turningPointNote: Borat discovers Tutar has become a right-wing reporter and will be at a protest

scenes.heading: INT. LOCKDOWN HOUSE - A LITTLE LATER
scenes.summary: Borat and the housemates search for Tutar at a large anti-lockdown protest while a speaker rallies the crowd against masks and government restrictions.

scenes.heading: EXT. LOCKDOWN PROTEST - NEXT DAY
scenes.summary: Borat accidentally gets called on stage as Country Steve and performs with a bluegrass band, terrifying him as Jim and Jerry watch from the crowd.

scenes.heading: EXT. LOCKDOWN PROTEST - STAGE - MINUTES LATER
scenes.summary: Jim and Jerry interrupt Tutar's interview to tell her Borat will be killed by cows and turnips if she doesn't go to a man in Washington DC, while Borat continues performing on stage.
scenes.turningPointNote: Tutar learns of the death threat against Borat, forcing her to choose between her freedom and his life

scenes.heading: EXT. LOCKDOWN PROTEST - MINUTES LATER
scenes.summary: Jim and Jerry debrief Borat who now wears an underwear mask, with Borat confused but having everything he wanted as Tutar will give herself to Giuliani.

scenes.heading: EXT. LOCKDOWN PROTEST - MINUTES LATER
scenes.summary: Tutar calls to arrange an interview with Giuliani, identifying herself as Grace Sagdiyev from Patriot's Report.

scenes.heading: INT. VAN / EXT. PROTEST - MINUTES LATER
scenes.summary: Borat drives smiling about returning to Kazakhstan as a hero, but his face falls as he realizes something precious is missing.

scenes.heading: INT. PICKUP - SAME TIME
scenes.summary: Borat asks the babysitter for Tutar's ball and chain while the babysitter maintains social distance and asks about COVID testing.

scenes.heading: EXT. BABYSITTER’S HOUSE - FRONT DOOR - A LITTLE LATER
scenes.summary: The babysitter gives Borat the ball and chain plus a cupcake from Tutar, while Borat explains Tutar will gift herself to her new owner like Melania.

scenes.heading: EXT. BABYSITTER’S HOUSE - BACKYARD - MOMENTS LATER
scenes.summary: Borat races through traffic to reach Tutar while she arrives at a Manhattan hotel and gets in the elevator to meet Giuliani.

scenes.heading: INT. PICKUP / EXT. STREET - DAY
scenes.summary: Borat continues racing while cutting people off as Tutar prepares by inflating balloon breasts and drinking alcohol in the hotel bathroom.

scenes.heading: INT. PICKUP / EXT. STREET - SAME
scenes.summary: Borat makes great time while changing into his boom disguise and running a red light.

scenes.heading: INT. PICKUP / EXT. STREET - SAME TIME
scenes.summary: (no summary)

scenes.heading: INT. HOTEL - LIVING AREA - MINUTES LATER
scenes.summary: (no summary)

scenes.heading: EXT. STREET / HOTEL BUILDING - MINUTES LATER
scenes.summary: Borat gets out of a pickup truck and sprints across the street to a hotel, dressed as a boom operator and putting on his mustache as he runs.

scenes.heading: INT. HOTEL BUILDING - LOBBY - SAME TIME
scenes.summary: Borat wearing an underwear mask runs into the hotel lobby but is blocked by security who demands ID and threatens to call police when he says he needs to save his daughter upstairs.

scenes.heading: INT. HOTEL SUITE - LIVING AREA - SAME TIME
scenes.summary: Tutar hands Giuliani the daughter manual, telling him it used to belong to her father but she thinks he should keep it, and Giuliani thanks her while flipping to a page with an image of a vagina.

scenes.heading: INT. HOTEL BUILDING - LOBBY - SAME TIME
scenes.summary: Security tells Borat they've called the police and orders him to get out, forcing Borat to exit the hotel lobby and consider a Plan B.

scenes.heading: INT. HOTEL SUITE - LIVING AREA - SAME TIME
scenes.summary: Tutar questions Giuliani about China and national security, and he claims China manufactured and deliberately spread the virus worldwide, then flirtatiously agrees to eat a bat with her.

scenes.heading: INT. HOTEL SUITE - LIVING AREA - SAME TIME
scenes.summary: Giuliani tells Tutar that Trump saved a million lives by acting swiftly against Democratic advice, then they clink glasses of whiskey and laugh playfully as he compliments her appearance.

scenes.heading: INT. HOTEL SUITE - LIVING AREA / BEDROOM - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Tutar touches Giuliani's knee and leads him to the adjacent bedroom where he massages her neck, asks for her contact information, and lies back on the bed as she removes his microphone.
scenes.turningPointNote: The compromising situation with Giuliani reaches its climax - the central mission moment

scenes.heading: EXT. HOTEL BUILDING / ALLEYWAY - A LITTLE LATER
scenes.summary: Borat and Tutar run at full speed from the hotel, laughing and out of breath, where Borat admits he loves her more than his sons and she tearfully insists on coming with him to face execution.
scenes.turningPointNote: Borat's emotional breakthrough - admitting he loves Tutar more than his sons transforms their relationship

scenes.heading: INT. KAZAKHSTAN PRESIDENTIAL PALACE - OFFICE - DAY
scenes.summary: Borat and Tutar stand before Nazarbayev ready for punishment as Borat reads his will, but Nazarbayev surprises them by saying they won't be killed because people make mistakes.

scenes.heading: EXT. FOOTAGE - FLASHBACK
scenes.summary: Footage from the first movie's release plays as Borat's voiceover describes being a total failure whose world fell to pieces.

scenes.heading: INT. KAZAKHSTAN PRESIDENTIAL PALACE - OFFICE - BACK TO SCENE
scenes.summary: A wall sign reading 'CREATE VIRUS' is visible in the Kazakhstan Presidential Palace office.

scenes.heading: INT. LOCKDOWN HOUSE - FLASHBACK [PREVIOUSLY SHOT]
scenes.summary: In flashback, Borat asks Jim and Jerry if 'they' made the plague, and they confirm yes.

scenes.heading: INT. HOTEL SUITE - FLASHBACK [PREVIOUSLY SHOT]
scenes.summary: In flashback, Giuliani tells Tutar that China deliberately spread the virus all around the world.

scenes.heading: INT. KAZAKHSTAN PRESIDENTIAL PALACE - OFFICE - BACK TO SCENE
scenes.summary: A wall shows 'PATIENT ZERO CANDIDATES' with Borat's photo circled as Borat and Tutar observe.

scenes.heading: INT. SHITTY MEDICAL CENTRE - FLASHBACK
scenes.summary: In flashback, Dr. Yamak injects Borat while Giuliani's voiceover discusses the virus coming from a laboratory and eating bats.

scenes.heading: INT. KAZAKHSTAN PRESIDENTIAL PALACE - OFFICE - BACK TO SCENE
scenes.summary: A wall sign reads 'INJECTION: BAT & PANGOLIN' as the revelation continues.

scenes.heading: INT. SHITTY MEDICAL CENTRE - FLASHBACK
scenes.summary: In flashback, Borat notices a weird lab assistant putting a bat into a flask as Dr. Yamak injects him.

scenes.heading: EXT. MEL GIBSON SQUARE - FLASHBACK [PREVIOUSLY SHOT]
scenes.summary: In flashback, Borat's microphone is taken and snapped in two at Mel Gibson Square while his voiceover discusses Premier Nazarbayev's power.

scenes.heading: INT. KAZAKHSTAN PRESIDENTIAL PALACE - OFFICE - BACK TO SCENE
scenes.summary: Borat's face is shown in the palace office as the revelation unfolds.

scenes.heading: INT. FAX STORE - FLASHBACK [PREVIOUSLY SHOT]
scenes.summary: In flashback, a fax employee explains that Nazarbayev sent Borat a bunch of angry face emojis.

scenes.heading: INT. KAZAKHSTAN PRESIDENTIAL PALACE - OFFICE - BACK TO SCENE
scenes.summary: Borat and Tutar are shown in the palace office with a wall sign reading 'SPREAD ACROSS WORLD'.

scenes.heading: EXT. VILLAGE - FLASHBACK [PREVIOUSLY SHOT]
scenes.summary: In flashback, Borat pulls a cart out of his village as villagers shout, declaring he's going to America.

scenes.heading: EXT. GALVESTON PORT, TEXAS - FLASHBACK [PREVIOUSLY SHOT]
scenes.summary: In flashback, Borat walks off a ship at Galveston Port, Texas.

scenes.heading: EXT. MAP GRAPHIC
scenes.summary: A map graphic shows the first stop was Wuhan, China, while Giuliani's voiceover discusses spreading the virus worldwide.

scenes.heading: EXT. MARKET IN WUHAN, CHINA - FLASHBACK
scenes.summary: In flashback, Borat coughs violently in a market full of food and people in Wuhan, China.

scenes.heading: INT. KAZAKHSTAN PRESIDENTIAL PALACE - OFFICE - BACK TO SCENE
scenes.summary: Borat's face is shown in the Kazakhstan Presidential Palace office as the realization continues.

scenes.heading: EXT. MAP GRAPHIC
scenes.summary: A map graphic shows the boat stopping in Sydney, Australia.

scenes.heading: EXT. SYDNEY OPERA HOUSE, AUSTRALIA - FLASHBACK
scenes.summary: In flashback, Borat approaches Tom Hanks at the Sydney Opera House for an autograph and coughs on him, causing Tom to lean away.

scenes.heading: EXT. MAP GRAPHIC
scenes.summary: A map graphic shows the boat stopping in Rome, Italy, then Galveston, Texas, while Mike Pence's voiceover mentions fifteen coronavirus cases.

scenes.heading: INT. CONVENTION CENTER - AUDITORIUM HALL - FLASHBACK
scenes.summary: In flashback, Mike Pence speaks at a convention center auditorium saying they're ready for anything.

scenes.heading: EXT. BABYSITTER'S HOUSE - FLASHBACK [PREVIOUSLY SHOT]
scenes.summary: In flashback, Borat asks a babysitter why she's wearing a mask and she explains it's because of the virus going around.

scenes.heading: INT/EXT. VARIOUS LOCATIONS - FLASHBACK
scenes.summary: A series of shots shows Borat kissing many people on the cheek in various locations.

scenes.heading: INT. KAZAKHSTAN PRESIDENTIAL PALACE - OFFICE - BACK TO SCENE
scenes.summary: Borat's face is shown in the Kazakhstan Presidential Palace office as the revelation builds.

scenes.heading: INT/EXT. VARIOUS SHOTS - FLASHBACK
scenes.summary: Rapid shots show Borat close to people and those same people coughing, with voiceovers about the virus spreading worldwide and threatening death.

scenes.heading: INT. KAZAKHSTAN PRESIDENTIAL PALACE - OFFICE - BACK TO SCENE
scenes.summary: Borat has a lightbulb moment, drops his glass, and runs out of the room as the full realization hits him.
scenes.turningPointNote: Borat realizes he was used to spread the virus - the major revelation that reframes the entire story

scenes.heading: INT. KAZAKHSTAN PRESIDENTIAL PALACE - CORRIDOR - MOMENTS
scenes.summary: Borat confronts Nazarbayev about using him to spread the virus, Nazarbayev admits their revenge plan worked brilliantly, and Borat reveals he's been recording the confession on FaceTime with Brian.
scenes.turningPointNote: The climactic confrontation where Nazarbayev confesses to the virus plot and Borat exposes him

scenes.heading: EXT. VILLAGE - MAIN STREET - DAY
scenes.summary: Three months later, Borat addresses the camera as a reporter in a grey suit, announcing that Kazakhstan is now a feminist nation like the USA and Saudi Arabia.

scenes.heading: EXT. VILLAGE - DAY
scenes.summary: Borat announces that bride exports were declared misogynist so they now traffic grooms instead.

scenes.heading: EXT. DOCKS - DAY
scenes.summary: Eight 14-year-old boys dressed in tuxedos are loaded into a crate labeled 'Ship To: K.Spacey' at the docks, mirroring the opening scene.

scenes.heading: EXT. VILLAGE - DAY
scenes.summary: Borat explains they use his iPhone 4's hotspot and steal passwords from Uzbekistan.

scenes.heading: 117 INT. TROLL FARM - DAY 117
scenes.summary: Hundreds of women work in a troll farm influencing elections worldwide, including an 8-year-old Kazakh girl typing 'speaking as a black man, I love Trump' on Facebook.

scenes.heading: EXT. VILLAGE - DAY
scenes.summary: Borat lowers his mask to reveal he's invented the 'mask-ini' - a mask attached to a cockpouch - and does a little dance.

scenes.heading: EXT. VILLAGE - DAY
scenes.summary: People line up for temperature checks where a thermometer is inserted in one person's rectum then used in the next person's mouth, with Borat noting their fatality rate plummeted to 92%.

scenes.heading: EXT. BORAT’S HOUSE - DAY
scenes.summary: Borat in Mickey Mouse pajamas meets Tutar in a grey suit outside his house, where she's revealed as the number three journalist in Kazakhstan and corrects his mansplaining.

scenes.heading: EXT. COBBLE STREETS - “RUNNING OF THE YANK” - DAY
scenes.summary: Borat and Tutar in identical suits report on the 'Running of the American' festival featuring masked crowds chasing caricatured Americans with MAGA hats spewing green liquid and a racist Karen with an AR-15.
